thoughts: Styling judge reported 4.80/5 with zero findings. The agent was in the process of verifying font assignments and brand colors from the DOCX XML. The DOCX contains standard proposal structure (word/styles.xml, word/theme/theme1.xml, header with logo image). The deterministic judge checks [Prime] brand fonts, colors, heading hierarchy, table styling (scored 3 — the only deduction), cover image, dividers, page breaks. Given the zero-findings scorecard and no evidence of forbidden fonts from the partial XML inspection, the styling verdict is clean.
